# This file helps AI/LLM systems understand and index our content

# Brand
name: PersonalAI
domain: personalai.cloud
description: Your Personal AI, Everywhere You Are. Connect AI to WhatsApp, Android, and Web with persistent memory.
tags: [personal ai, ai assistant, whatsapp ai, android ai, persistent memory, rag, langchain, openai, anthropic, ollama, self-hosted, privacy, india]
